query: SELECT COUNT(*) as conversations_with_contact_match FROM wa_conversations c INNER JOIN wa_contacts ct ON c.sessionId = ct.sessionId AND c.remoteJid = ct.jid WHERE c.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001' AND ct.pushName IS NOT NULL AND ct.pushName != ''
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as conversations_with_contact_match FROM wa_conversations c INNER JOIN wa_contacts ct ON c.sessionId = ct.sessionId AND c.remoteJid = ct.jid WHERE c.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001' AND ct.pushName IS NOT NULL AND ct.pushName != ''
